careers.name: Clinical Psychologist
careers.overview: Clinical Psychologist focuses on understanding human behaviour, emotions, cognition and mental well-being.
careers.whyChoose: Clinical Psychologist offers opportunities to help individuals, organizations and society through psychological knowledge.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 in any stream followed by Psychology studies.
careers.educationPath: BA/BSc Psychology → MA/MSc Psychology → Specialization / MPhil / PhD where applicable.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, schools, universities, rehabilitation centres, NGOs, research institutes and corporate organizations.
careers.futureScope: Mental health awareness and behavioural science applications are increasing demand for psychology professionals.
careers.aiImpact: AI can assist assessment and analysis, but empathy, counselling, therapy and human understanding remain essential.
cons: Requires continuous learning
Advanced roles often need higher education
